OpenHardwareMonitorLib.dll and its managed runtime dependencies in this package come from:
https://www.nuget.org/packages/OpenHardwareMonitorLib/1.0.9513

Upstream repository:
https://github.com/HardwareMonitor/openhardwaremonitor

winmon does not modify these libraries.

Upstream README notes:
- some sensors may require administrator privileges

See MPL-2.0.txt in the same directory for the bundled license text.
Additional bundled dependency licenses:
- SergiyE.Common.dll: GPL-3.0-only, see GPL-3.0.txt
- HidSharp.dll: see HIDSHARP-LICENSE.txt
